item.title: NO, YOU MOVE.
item.description: “Doesn't matter what the press says. Doesn't matter what the politicians or the mobs say. Doesn't matter if the whole country decides that something wrong is something right. This nation was founded on one principle above all else: The requirement that we stand up for what we believe, no matter the odds or the consequences. When the mob and the press and the whole world tell you to move, your job is to plant yourself like a tree beside the river of truth, and tell the whole world -- "No, YOU move.” SEMPER FI DEVIL DOG
item.dc:creator: TheRealSauceBoss

item.title: Cricket was the name of Noem's dog that she shot.
item.dc:creator: J2UDIGI

item.title: 110 Service Members Filed Complaints That Commanders Said Trump Was Anointed By Jesus To Spark Armageddon. The First Amendment Would Like A Fucking Word.
item.description:
110 U.S. service members. 40 units. 30 military bases. All filing complaints that commanders told them the Iran war is "part of God's divine plan" and Trump was "anointed by Jesus to spark Armageddon." This is not medieval history. This is Tuesday. ?
The Founders built a wall between church and state because they'd seen what happens when generals take orders from God instead of the Constitution. It's called a Crusade. Crusades have a body count. The First Amendment was not a fucking suggestion. It was a warning. ⚔️?? #FirstAmendment #ChurchAndState #MilitaryReligion #MRFF #ConstitutionalCrisis #ItWasAWarningNotASuggestion
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.description:
1
2
3
4

7
8

15
16
17 science is green, math is red
18
19
20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @ftentor did this one! Check out their other posts for more cool artwork.
27 Man Tax: By request, Elliot Page
“Contrary to the rumors that you've heard, I was not born in a manger. I was actually born on Krypton and sent here by my father, Jor-El, to save the planet Earth.” - Barack Obama So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: I drove to another province to pick up my step daughter
item.dc:creator: SkyPigeon123

item.title: Every Word Except The One That Would Have Ended This Immediately. Funny How That Fucking Works.
item.description: Let me get this straight. The Secretary of Homeland Security was asked under OATH if she was sleeping with Corey Lewandowski. She called it "outrageous." She expressed shock at "tabloid garbage." She did literally everything EXCEPT say the word NO. IN A CONGRESSIONAL HEARING. UNDER OATH. ?? She then said "I am shocked we are peddling tabloid garbage." MADAM YOU ARE THE SECRETARY OF HOMELAND FUCKING SECURITY. You have a secret bag. You have a Lewandowski. You have a husband who apparently receives information on a need-to-know basis. THIS IS A NATIONAL SECURITY ISSUE!! ? And the husband is just... THERE. Sitting at home. Finding out his wife's extracurricular activities via a Congressional hearing like the rest of us. Sir. SIR. Are you okay?? Do you need someone to call?? We can recommend a lawyer. Several, actually. ?⚖️? The woman responsible for protecting America's borders cannot secure her own marriage, is carrying secret bags on flights with her alleged boyfriend, and responded to questions about it under oath with "I didn't hear a no." THESE ARE THE ADULTS RUNNING THE COUNTRY. God help us all. ???? #KristiNoem #HomelandSecurity #FindingOutLive #NeedToKnowBasis #TheHusbandHasQuestions #SirAreYouOkay #CallALawyer #NotablyNotNo
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Body painted myself as Pennywise - Inspired by Jamie Tyndall
item.description:
I AM IN THE UK AND HAVE BEEN BLOCKED FROM USING IMGUR!!! PLEASE FIND ME ON OTHER SOCIALS I AM TRYINGGGGGGG I'm on twitch most of the time btw PLEASE find me on https://linktr.ee/mcroft07?utm_source=linktree_profile_share since I only post a small selection of my work here. I HATE THE GOVERNMENTS TOO Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I just looked at pictures and did what I wanted with the design tbh. I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. Thank you to everyone who wants to help me with VPNs etc but please note that I am highly concerned about someone doxxing me so I will not accept any offer on this. I also don't want to pay for a VPN to use ONE website, so I just click through until I can get through, if I can get through, post and interact with the community for a while then turn it off. This is a real threat to me, I have been grabbed in the streets and had people attempt to follow me home before, so I take safety online and offline very seriously. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! Really proud of myself because I just bought a cheap top from Vinted and it was too small so I changed the back from a zipper to a corset style top to make it bigger to fit me and it worked! My secondary school textiles teacher would be proud of me! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. No it isn't AI, I fucking hate AI I used to do nothing with my hands and people told me I wasn't really painting, so I started painting bits while lip syncing and while recording and doing the transitions and people still hate it so honestly go fuck yourself and don't watch my shit then you're boring I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. To everyone who thinks I paint it "wrong" you do it, show me it and I will critique it. The difference is that I will try and put myself out there, I respect artists to grow themselves and find their own way and style because I am an artist, not some blindsided bystander buffoon who thinks they know more about a subject they've never tried. Check yourself with your unsolicited advice and criticism. On that topic, I can handle criticism which is usually the defence people take when I point out that I did not ask. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
This is Jamie Tyndall's work, he has a lot of cool artwork and I think his style and costume design for characters is really cool and inspiring so I based mine on this one. You can find more of his work here: https://jamietyndall.net/products/ahsoka-print-2

item.title: The Truth about SNAP and Trump's 2026 Disgusting "Reforms"
item.description:
The changes below are for FLORIDA.
Here's the list of nation wide reforms.
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/InmY4qSsNgQ https://www.fns.usda.gov/snap/waivers/foodrestriction Over 40million American's are on SNAP. Many of which have full time jobs but a little extra help to make ends meet. Almost all of Wal-Mart workers, one of the largest employers in America, are on SNAP. Along with many other large employers such as Amazon and Dollar General.
item.dc:creator: Imadethisaccounttopost
